tagline: Creating Connections. Growing Leaders. Advancing Supply Chains.

hero.headline: Building the Future of Supply Chain Leadership
hero.subheadline: Your community for supply chain growth—on campus and across the nation.

whyGetInvolved: WISE Connections helps university supply chain students build meaningful relationships, develop professional skills, strengthen leadership abilities, and gain a deeper understanding of the opportunities and careers in the industry. Through campus programming, national events, industry engagement, mentorship, and a national network of peers and professionals, students involved with WISE gain experiences and connections that help them thrive in college and beyond.
ourStory: WISE was founded at the University of Arkansas to help supply chain students build connections, develop professionally, strengthen leadership skills, and deepen their understanding of the supply chain industry. What began as a student-focused initiative has grown into a national network that connects universities, students, faculty, industry professionals, and organizations committed to developing the next generation of supply chain talent.

Over the years, WISE has expanded through campus chapters, leadership opportunities, industry partnerships, professional development programs, and signature events such as the annual WISE Future Leaders Symposium. Thousands of students have participated in WISE programs, gaining valuable experiences, building lifelong relationships, and discovering the many career paths available within supply chain management.
Today, WISE continues to create opportunities for students to connect, learn, and grow while helping shape the future of the supply chain profession.
mission: WISE creates opportunities for students to build connections, develop professionally, strengthen leadership skills, and gain industry knowledge that prepares them for impactful careers in supply chain management.

values.title: Connection
values.description: We believe meaningful relationships create opportunities, foster belonging, and strengthen the supply chain community.

values.title: Growth
values.description: We encourage continuous learning, personal development, and the pursuit of new experiences.

values.title: Leadership
values.description: We empower students to lead with confidence, integrity, and purpose.

values.title: Industry Understanding
values.description: We help students explore the complexity and impact of supply chains while connecting classroom learning to real-world practice.

values.title: Service
values.description: We believe in using our knowledge, skills, and influence to positively impact others and strengthen our communities.

founderQuote.text:
The opportunities that shape our careers often begin with a single conversation, connection, or act of encouragement. When WISE began, the goal was simple: create opportunities for students to connect with one another, learn from industry professionals, and discover the many possibilities within supply chain management. Over time, I have watched WISE become much more than a program or organization. It has become a community—a place where students build confidence, form lifelong friendships, develop as leaders, and begin to see the impact they can have on the world.

My hope is that every student who becomes involved with WISE leaves with stronger connections, greater confidence, and a belief that they belong in the future of our profession. The future of supply chain is bright, and I am excited to see how each new generation of WISE leaders will shape it.
founderQuote.author: Stephanie Thomas

offers.title: Campus Chapters

offers.title: Future Leaders Symposium

offers.title: Career Explorer
